ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "building_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of building the property is in */,
  "property_number" INTEGER /* Number assigned to the property within the building */,
  "area_sq_ft" REAL /* Area of the property in square feet */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the property */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the property (e.g., Sold, Available, Under Contract) */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of property */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the property listing was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_building_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_type_id") REFERENCES building_types ("building_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_types" (
  "building_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building type */,
  "building_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the building type (e.g., Apartment Building, Commercial Building) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the building type */,
  "max_floors" INTEGER /* Maximum number of floors in the building */,
  "min_floors" INTEGER /* Minimum number of floors in the building */,
  "construction_year" INTEGER /* Year the building was constructed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "property_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type (e.g., Apartment, Commercial Space) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the property was sold */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent handling the sale */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "commission_amount" REAL /* Amount of commission paid to the agent */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was finalized */,
  "sale_status" TEXT /* Status of the sale (e.g., Completed, Pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the agent */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the agent belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the agent joined the company */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the agent (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the buyer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the buyer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the buyer */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date the buyer registered */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the buyer (e.g., Referral, Online Ad) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Full name of the seller */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the seller */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the seller */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the seller */,
  "date_listed" TEXT /* Date the property was listed for sale */,
  "motivation" TEXT /* Seller's motivation for selling (e.g., Moving, Investment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_size" REAL /* Size of the image in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the document belongs to */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., Title Deed, Inspection Report) */,
  "document_version" INTEGER /* Version of the document */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_documents_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_documents_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property details */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property details were accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the property details */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the property details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
